title: Navore Market AggTech Startup
description: A San Diego food marketplace connecting local producers with consumers through a modern, mobile-first operating model. USDA-backed and built around real logistics, trust, and neighborhood demand.
challenge: Local food systems are fragmented across producer discovery, ordering, logistics, trust, and recurring neighborhood demand. The opportunity required more than a storefront: it needed a practical operating model.
approach: I built Navore as a marketplace and operating system together—pairing customer experience with producer relationships, hub operations, grant strategy, logistics, and feedback loops.
outcomes: Launched a real local-food marketplace and neighborhood hub.
Secured USDA-backed funding to expand the model.
Created operating workflows connecting demand, producers, fulfillment, and growth.

title: Personal AI Operations System
description: A private, local-first AI operations system for agent workflows: gateway, memory RAG, Discord collaboration, dashboard visibility, scheduled briefs, and multi-machine orchestration.
challenge: Useful AI agents need more than a chat interface. They need durable memory, task coordination, live system visibility, safe automation, and a way to operate across machines and channels.
approach: I designed a local-first agent operations stack around a persistent gateway, specialized lanes, memory RAG, Discord coordination, scheduled workflows, and a unified FastAPI dashboard.
outcomes: Unified agent coordination, memory, monitoring, and handoffs.
Built live operational visibility across projects and machines.
Automated recurring briefs, health checks, and task workflows.

title: HealthRise EHR & Revenue Operations
description: A healthtech startup combining electronic health record software, revenue cycle management, and consulting services to improve healthcare operations.
challenge: Healthcare organizations often manage disconnected clinical, billing, and operational workflows. HealthRise addressed the need for technology and hands-on operational support within one startup offering.
approach: The company combined EHR software with revenue cycle management and consulting work, connecting the technology layer to the operational realities of healthcare delivery and reimbursement.
outcomes: Supported healthcare operations through an integrated technology and services model.
Connected clinical workflows with revenue cycle operations.
Delivered consulting support alongside the startup's EHR and RCM offerings.

title: Johnson Matthey Global Sustainability
description: Led 12 enterprise transformation programs at a global specialty chemicals manufacturer, driving +37% process efficiency. Founded the North America Government Affairs function from scratch.
challenge: Enterprise transformation at a global specialty chemicals manufacturer required coordinating complex programs across operations, stakeholders, and organizational boundaries while creating durable new capabilities.
approach: I led a portfolio of transformation programs focused on measurable operating improvement, while also building the North America Government Affairs function from the ground up.
outcomes: Drove a 37% improvement in process efficiency.
Founded the North America Government Affairs function from scratch.

title: Personal Portfolio
description: This Astro-powered site: a living portfolio for projects, writing, and public proof-of-work rather than a static resume page.

title: Globalization Photojournalism Exhibit
description: A photojournalism exhibit exploring globalization through fieldwork in Tibet and Mongolia.
challenge: Globalization is often discussed through abstract economic and political language. The project sought to document how it appeared in lived environments and everyday experience.
approach: I conducted fieldwork in Tibet and Mongolia, using photography and firsthand observation to build a visual narrative around globalization and cultural change.
outcomes: Produced a photojournalism exhibit based on international fieldwork.
Translated an abstract global issue into a visual narrative.
Documented perspectives and environments across Tibet and Mongolia.
